race.comment: RAISED BY WOLVES (9) caught the eye in a similar race won by AMALFI AMORE here two runs back carrying 1.5kgs more than today. Tackled a BM82 subsequently over the mile at Coffs Harbour and did a tremendous job to charge home and finish less than a length from the winner. Clear top pick dropping back to a BM58 this afternoon. STROBING (2) finished just over a length ahead of RAISED BY WOLVES when they clashed here at this trip two runs ago. Outclassed in town last time but back in this grade he is a serious contender. On-pacer DAMASCUS GATE (3) continued his fine run of recent form when a close third over 1600m at Taree a fortnight ago. Raced once over 1800m and was successful. Will give them a tough bunny to catch. AMALFI AMORE (4) defeated some of today's key rivals in a comparable race to this 22 days ago. Getting up in the weights but cannot be ruled out. ROCKBARTON ICON (1) has been struggling against better opposition but he deserves another chance back in a BM58.
